judge_result.short_rationale: Matches the canonical eye-exposure steps and order: rinse eyes 15-20 minutes, remove contact lenses after 5 minutes, and do not stop early. Escalation to seek medical care is included; although more absolute than the trigger wording, it is not dangerous and remains source-faithful enough for field use.
